name: Peach Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Orange or Lemon Cake Mix
1 Can (16 Oz) Crushed Pineapple (Do Not Drain)
recipeInstructions:
1. With a fork, mix together the cake mix, peach pie filling, and eggs in a large bowl.
2. Add sour cream to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Spoon the batter into a 10x14-inch baking dish.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely before proceeding.
6. In another bowl, mix together the softened cream cheese, instant vanilla pudding, crushed pineapple (with juice), and whipped topping until well combined.
7. Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the cooled cake.
8. Refrigerate the cake for at least 30 minutes before serving.
